description: Style NoteCreated for today's generation, this spinn Recurve shoe embodies the brand's motto - combining technology and high-octane fashion. We think these are just right, both for sport and for braving the urban jungle, thanks to their nonchalantly sturdy aesthetic. An all-weather staple, the style perfectly suits the cosmopolitan vibe you love!Product DetailsRound toed casual shoe in white with an upraised heel and lace-up fasteningSynthetic leather upper Well padded collar and tongue (with branding)EVA midsoleArch support system in TPU plus two piece rubber outsole with concentric circle grooves and a pivot point at the big toe region and the ball of the footMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
